creator: pete@nomadlogic.org
text:
(In reply to pete from comment #2)
Sorry there was a typo in my previous reply.  HTTP_AUTH_KRB5 *is* enabled by default, I had to manually enable GSSAPI_MIT - after setting this to enabled the port built cleanly.  I am still not sure if we should set GSSAPI_MIT to enabled as default, or if there is another piece of logic I'm missing.
